OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Processes the household income details from the applicant's assessment response, and creates or updates party income records.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ProcessHouseholdIncome

childElements.name: CreateNewPartyIncomeRecord
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "CalendarYear" : "=%IncomeData:CalendarYear%", "Employer" : "=%HouseholdIncomeDetails:Employer%", "EndDate" : "=%IncomeData:EndDate%", "IncomeAmount" : "=%IncomeData:IncomeAmount%", "IncomeFrequency" : "=%HouseholdIncomeDetails:IncomeFrequency%", "IncomeStatus" : "Active", "IncomeType" : "Salary", "PartyId" : "=%AccountId%", "StartDate" : "=%IncomeData:StartDate%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSUpsertPartyIncome1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISBLANK(FetchExistingPartyIncomeRecordForSameEmployer:PartyIncomeId)", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction6", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: FetchExistingPartyIncomeRecordForSameEmployer
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "=%AccountId%", "Employer" : "=%HouseholdIncomeDetails:Employer%", "EndDate" : "=%IncomeData:EndDate%", "StartDate" : "=%IncomeData:StartDate%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchPartyIncomeForDateRange1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction8", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "=%AccountId%", "Employer" : "=%HouseholdIncomeDetails:Employer%", "EndDate" : "=ADDDAY('4000-12-30', 1)", "StartDate" : "=%IncomeData:StartDate%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchPartyIncomeSpanningDate1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: EndDatePreviousPartyIncomeRecord
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "CalendarYear" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:CalendarYear%", "Employer" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:Employer%", "EndDate" : "=ADDDAY(%IncomeData:StartDate%, -1)", "IncomeAmount" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:IncomeAmount%", "IncomeFrequency" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:IncomeFrequency%", "IncomeStatus" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:IncomeStatus%", "IncomeType" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:IncomeType%", "PartyId" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:PartyId%", "PartyIncomeId" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:PartyIncomeId%", "StartDate" : "=%FetchPreviousPartyIncomeRecords:Records:StartDate%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSUpsertPartyIncome1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction5", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: UpdateExistingPartyIncomeRecord
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "CalendarYear" : "=%FetchExistingPartyIncomeRecordForSameEmployer:CalendarYear%", "Employer" : "=%FetchExistingPartyIncomeRecordForSameEmployer:Employer%", "EndDate" : "=%FetchExistingPartyIncomeRecordForSameEmployer:EndDate%", "IncomeAmount" : "=%IncomeData:IncomeAmount%", "IncomeFrequency" : "=%FetchExistingPartyIncomeRecordForSameEmployer:IncomeFrequency%", "IncomeStatus" : "=%FetchExistingPartyIncomeRecordForSameEmployer:IncomeStatus%", "IncomeType" : "=%FetchExistingPartyIncomeRecordForSameEmployer:IncomeType%", "PartyId" : "=%FetchExistingPartyIncomeRecordForSameEmployer:PartyId%", "PartyIncomeId" : "=%FetchExistingPartyIncomeRecordForSameEmployer:PartyIncomeId%", "StartDate" : "=%FetchExistingPartyIncomeRecordForSameEmployer:StartDate%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSUpsertPartyIncome1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(FetchExistingPartyIncomeRecordForSameEmployer:PartyIncomeId)", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction6", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "description" : "", "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "labelPlural" : "", "labelSingular" : "", "linkToExternalObject" : "", "mockResponseMap" : { }, "nameColumn" : "", "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "rollbackOnError" : true, "trackingCustomData" : { }, "ttlMinutes" : 5 }
